forbid.label: Extension-UI check must compare origins, not substring-match a URL
forbid.advice: Use isExtensionFrontend(): a web page can put the extension id in its own URL, so substring matching is forgeable.

forbid.label: Do not substring-match trust fields on the message sender
forbid.advice: Compare parsed origins (isExtensionFrontend), not substrings of sender.url/origin.

forbid.label: Localhost gate must be an exact loopback host check, not a prefix
forbid.advice: Use isSecureOrigin(): startsWith('http://localhost') also admits http://localhost.evil.com.

require.label: Frontend trust gate present in permission middleware
Frontend trust gate present in background worker
SELF_ONLY_REQUESTS gate present in background worker
